programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern gives us a sweet taste of chocolate heaven with an overload of chocolatey desserts including a decadent Bombe au Chocolat.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: In this "C" challenge, Chef Robert Jewell cooks up recipes using coconut and crab before combining both into a single recipe. Using sweet coconut, Robert makes a classic dessert -- an irresistible coconut cream pie. He starts with a delectable crunchy graham cracker crust and tops his pie with fluffy whipped cream and toasted coconut flakes. Next, Robert transforms a fresh soft-shell crab into a delicious, spicy, and crunchy dish. The best part? It's fast and easy to make. After soaking the crab in milk, Robert dunks it into a flour-cornmeal mixture and fries it until golden brown. But that's not all, Robert whips up the perfect dipping sauce, using spicy smoked- jalapeno, lime, and...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: It's all about sesame and scallops in this letter "S" challenge, and host Theresa Visintin has some appetizing ideas up her sleeve. First, she shows us how to make scallop cassoulet, a simple recipe that can be cooked even faster than it can eaten! Theresa browns the tender scallops in delicious bacon fat and then bakes it on a bed of creamy kidney beans. Next, Theresa uses sesame seeds to create a zesty sauce for a take-out favourite, made in your very own kitchen - noodles! For her final recipe, our culinary host combines sesame and scallops, creating a juicy, crunchy masterpiece.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Making dishes with the letter “W” could be seen as a real challenge, but Chef Lauren Gulyas has got it covered. Choosing water chestnut and watercress as her star ingredients, Chef Lauren begins by serving up an Asian inspired rice dish complete with crunchy water chestnuts. She starts off cooking rice in chicken broth, a great way to infuse the grain with a subtle savoury flavour. Sautéing celery, garlic, and onion in sesame oil adds a flavour kick. Throw in some ginger, veggies, and water chestnuts and enjoy the sound of the sizzle. Next up, Lauren puts a peppery twist on a classic recipe, linguine with watercress pesto. Then it’s time for the grand finale, Chef Lauren uses both...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Tea and turkey are an unlikely combo for a meal, but Chef Robert Jewell is a creative force in the kitchen. First, he gives earl grey and lavender tea a sweet treatment by making a rich semifreddo. Robert creates a silky tea infused syrup, which he drizzles over a luxurious custard and tops with whipped cream. Robert punches up the colour by adding tart poached raspberries and vibrant violet lavender petals. Now, it's time for a real show stopper - saffron turkey kebabs with pomegranate rice. This is not your average turkey dinner. First, Robert marinates the turkey pieces in lime, yogourt and garlic. After infusing basmati rice with aromatic saffron and bay leaves, Robert tosses the rice...

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: For a quick and tasty meal, chef Spencer Watts cooks up fast favs using scallops and trout, all done in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef and seafood lover Spencer Watts mixes the sweet flavours of fruit with fish as he makes dishes with salmon and scallops.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.desc: Chef Dev prepares some of his favorite street foods that feature coconut, including Coconut Roti Flatbreads from Sri Lanka, God’s Bread from Portugal, and Mango Coconut Sticky Rice from Thailand.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.desc: Chef Dev shares recipes for some of his favorite street food desserts from around the world, including Custard Tarts from Portugal, Alfajores Sandwich Cookies from Argentina, and Purple Corn Pudding from Peru.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.desc: Chef Dev prepares comforting street food dishes from around the world, including Bindaetteok Pancakes from South Korea, Chicken Tamales from Mexico, and Sausage Rolls from the UK.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.desc: Chef Dev shows off street food dishes from around the world that feature basil, including Pesto Rice Balls from Italy, Holy Basil Chicken from Thailand, and Green Papaya and Beef Jerky Salad with Thai Basil from Vietnam.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an allergen friendly meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: kale and lentil salad with green goddess dressing, chickpea curry, and avocado key lime pie cups!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make breakfast for dinner for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: a veggie frittata, sweet and peppery bacon, a cottage cheese pancake stack, and fruit skewers!

programme.title: Holiday Eatz
programme.desc: Our fun and occasionally silly chef-host Kimberly Lallouz is taking on a Game Day menu for whatever bowl, cup, or ring your favourite team is bringing home this year! Wear your team colors and cook along as she updates perennial favourites like Chicken Wings (...grilled and smothered in savoury Suya spice!) and Loaded Nachos (with blue corn chips and decadently vegan with her chipotle-cashew 'cheeze!') Next, her Philly-style cheesy flank steak hoagie is a sure crowd pleaser, and for a final play, it's back to the grill with shrimp skewer made Buffalo-style with hot sauce, butter, and creamy avocado ranch dressing. Game on!

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.desc: A symbol of comfort and city pride, the Philly cheesesteak continues to inspire fresh imagination. Thin-sliced steak, melting cheese, and griddled bread set the foundation as new flavors and regional twists bring this iconic sandwich into a new era of creativity.

programme.title: Holiday Eatz
programme.desc: Summer Solstice is celebrated around the world with all manner of ritual and fun"... Holiday Eatz host Kimberly Lallouz is celebrating with a party menu that takes advantage of all those extra hours of sun! Homemade cheese in one day? You bet! It's easy and delicious in her Watermelon Salad with white balsamic vinegar and sunflower seed brittle. Her next course is grilled shrimp, scallops, avocados, and peaches? Yep! Washed down with a citrus spiked white sangria! A crispy skin pork belly Porchetta roast is next, stuffed with savoury summer herbs. For her finale, you'll love her rhubarb meringue pie, it's a mile high pie for a mile-wide smile"... what a way to spend the longest day!

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.desc: Around the world in one meal, global flavors come together on the griddle. Vibrant spices, sauces, and ingredients mix to form creative fusions that celebrate connection through food, offering a taste of adventure in every sizzling, flavorful bite.

programme.desc: La misión es llevar el mensaje de libertad a las naciones. A través de ganar almas y hacer discípulos podemos ayudar a las naciones a hacer una vida de libertad

programme.title: Joni Lamb: A Life Surrendered
programme.desc: Únase a nosotros para celebrar la vida, la fe y el legado de Joni Lamb, cofundadora de Daystar, cuyo impacto transformó vidas en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Above the Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: Showcasing one of the world's most famous mountain ranges, Banff National Park, from a higher perspective and is paired with healing music and subtle real-life nature sounds; soaring over places like Lake Louise and more from the Canadian Rockies.

programme.title: Golden Waves Crashing at Sunset
programme.desc: The shores of the iconic Baker Beach in San Francisco with a sunset scene filmed in high definition. Views of the Marin headlands and the Golden Gate Bridge.

programme.title: Bulog Dos Island
programme.desc: Showcasing a small tropical island encircled by crystal-clear turquoise waters called Bulog Dos Island in the Philippines.

programme.title: Broken Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Exploring the caves and sea tunnels of a natural pool surrounded by cliffs and stunning views.

programme.title: Glistening Forest Stream
programme.desc: The combination of sunlight, redwoods, crystal clear flowing water, and a lush green forest combine to create a nature experience in this scene from Muir Woods, CA.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: East Bali
programme.desc: A serene soundtrack amidst a journey to spectacular beaches in Bali.

programme.title: Watu Leter & Goa Cina Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Exploring the remote coasts of Indonesian beaches with limestone stacks in the bay.

programme.title: Green Bowl Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Escaping to a secluded beach in Bali where the lapping waves on the rocky shore soothe souls.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: Hawaii
programme.desc: Spending a restful moment in Maui, a tropical paradise of gleaming white sand beaches and turquoise waters.

programme.title: Shark Paradise
programme.desc: Captured by filmmaker collaborator Peter Schneider, Shark Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time scenes captured from around the world, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for deep relaxation by Relax Moods.

programme.title: Above the Fiji Islands
programme.desc: Featuring aerial views of remote South Pacific islands, accompanied by nature sounds and ambient music by Relax Moods; offering a mix of ground-level and bird's-eye perspectives through smooth, continuous shots, concluding with a real-time sunset over the sea.

programme.title: Fly Over Kelingking Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: A bird's eye view of a scenic beach surrounded by pristine waters and high cliffs.

programme.title: A Day in Santorini
programme.desc: A visual journey through the coastal village of Oia, found on the far tip of Santorini Island.

programme.title: Protected Native Forest: New Zealand
programme.desc: Exploring the former national park in the area of Te Urewera.

programme.title: California, U.S
programme.desc: Soar into the golden California sunset on the wings of paragliders.

programme.title: Beach of Australia
programme.desc: Australia's rugged beauty.

programme.title: The Soothing Sun
programme.desc: Rejoice and relax in the splendor of the glorious Sun for a full hour, with this new video by David Huting.

programme.title: Coastal Spring Flowers
programme.desc: Nature scenes from California's coast.

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: Healing Hawaii II: Oahu
programme.desc: The wonders of Oahu.

programme.desc: Vibrant underwater reefs, including many scenes which no longer look as depicted due to coral bleaching.

programme.title: Kapas Biru Waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Escape to Indonesia with tropical vegetation and a rushing waterfall.

programme.title: Beautiful Backcountry: Yukon River
programme.desc: The Yukon River snakes a path through the evergreen wilderness.

programme.title: Rugged Coast: Newfoundland
programme.desc: The solidarity peacefulness of the Fort Point lighthouse on Newfoundland and Labrador's rugged coast.

programme.title: Above the Fiji Islands
programme.desc: Featuring aerial views of remote South Pacific islands, accompanied by nature sounds and ambient music by Relax Moods; offering a mix of ground-level and bird's-eye perspectives through smooth, continuous shots, concluding with a real-time sunset over the sea.

programme.title: Whiritoa Beach, New Zealand
programme.desc: Discover the raw beauty of this secluded New Zealand beach, surrounded by wildflowers.

programme.title: Beautiful Kauai: Hawaii
programme.desc: Kauai's natural beauty.

programme.title: Cliffside Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: The thrilling view of a cliff-top lookout of one of Indonesia's most breathtaking spots.

programme.title: Hawaii Palms + Waves
programme.desc: Featuring a scene of coastal palms, green grass and blue waves in the early morning light and a backdrop of stereo nature sounds; shot on location in Oahu, Hawaii at the Turtle Bay Resort.

programme.title: Cape Reinga & Giant Sand Dunes: New Zealand
programme.desc: Experiencing a waterfall flowing down a forest wall, surrounded by overgrown vines.

programme.title: Wharariki Beach I: New Zealand
programme.desc: Exploring the sandy shores and rocky cliffs of a majestic beach in New Zealand.

programme.title: A Day on the Napali Coast
programme.desc: An ambient nature film features the sights and sounds of the 11-mile Kalalau Trail on the Hawaiian island of Kauai.

programme.title: Chemin Pealey: Îles de la Madeleine
programme.desc: Admiring the tranquility of water.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 2
programme.desc: Vibrant underwater reefs, including many scenes which no longer look as depicted due to coral bleaching.

programme.title: Earth From Above
programme.desc: Traveling the world with a birds-eye-view perspective of scenic wonders.

programme.title: Fly Over Spectacular Sights: Indonesia
programme.desc: A bird's-eye view of Indonesia's spectacular scenery.

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: Redwood Coast: California
programme.desc: Exploring forests with some of the biggest trees in the world.

programme.title: Hamilton Island Palms
programme.desc: Soaking up the tropical breeze with the stunning palm and coastal vista from the famous Hamilton Island, Australia.

programme.title: Wonders of Nature
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the magical and relaxing wonders of nature with an ambient relaxation video featuring world-class music by Darshan Ambient; in it, you'll be transported to over 30 different natural locations around the world.

programme.title: Ulun Danu Temple: Indonesia
programme.desc: Feel the tranquility of an ancient temple and the serene views of its surrounding waters.

programme.title: Dawn in Paradise
programme.desc: The magical sounds of a tropical island in the early morning hours just before sunrise.

programme.title: Benang Kelambu & Stokel: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experience a waterfall flowing down a forest wall, surrounded by overgrown vines.

programme.title: Garden of Eden
programme.desc: Discover the world's natural beauty with flowers, butterflies, and waterfalls.

programme.title: Dolphin Voyage Relaxation
programme.desc: Underwater cinematography, a synergistic blend of audio including underwater nature sounds, and calming ambient music combine to induce relaxation in the deep blue calming ocean with a pod of friendly dolphins.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: Hawaii
programme.desc: Spending a restful moment in Maui, a tropical paradise of gleaming white sand beaches and turquoise waters.

programme.title: Cascading waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a trip through the Indonesian jungle to a remote waterfall cascading over a natural cave.

programme.title: Relaxing Tide: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Relaxing in a Caribbean paradise by the lighthouse on the Dominican Republic's Bayahibe Beach.

programme.title: Above the Spanish Islands
programme.desc: Sweeping viewers on an aerial voyage over Mallorca and the Canary Islands.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Athens
programme.desc: Malini explores the ancient city of Athens, Greece. Once steeped in history, Athens has experienced a modern rebirth, now thriving with creativity, modern Greek gastronomy, a vibrant contemporary art scene, and unmatched nightlife.

programme.title: Whats On Sports Across the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean celebrates athleticism. Italy hosts The Torino Royal Marathon and Maratona Reale, while France Roc d Azur brings mountain biking excitement. Croatia CRO Race showcases professional cycling, and Cyprus hosts both the Limassol Marathon and Leptos Cyprus 4 Day Challenge. From road races to endurance challenges, sports unite communities along stunning Mediterranean landscapes.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Here along the Côte d’Azur, we wander the sunlit promenades of Nice, catch whispers of fortunes changing hands at Monaco’s famed casino, and step inside the elegant villas once home to artists and heiresses.

programme.title: Med Nations 11 Tunisia
programme.desc: From the historic medina of Tunis to coastal towns full of local traditions, Tunisia reveals a rich tapestry of culture, flavours, and Mediterranean life shaped by diverse civilisations.

programme.title: Mediterranean Yoga Start Your Day Gently
programme.desc: Mediterranean Yoga is a series that blends Embodiment Yoga with the peaceful beauty of the Mediterranean. Set in stunning coastal and natural locations, each episode encourages viewers to reconnect mind and body through gentle movement, breathwork, and mindfulness in a safe and calming space.

programme.title: Med Minds 10 Julius Caesar
programme.desc: Julius Caesar, the formidable leader of ancient Rome, became a lasting symbol of ambition, power, and transformation, shaping the destiny of the Mediterranean world through conquest, vision, and a legacy that endures beyond his dramatic fall.

programme.title: Verona I della Scala
programme.desc: This episode tells Verona’s story through the rise and fall of the Della Scala family, pioneers of the Italian Renaissance. From Cangrande to Mastino II, we follow their power struggle with Venice, booming trade, and eventual exile to Bavaria.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: With its thought-provoking sights, delicious cuisine, and idyllic coastline, it's no wonder Normandy is both a Mecca for history buffs and a popular getaway for Parisians.

programme.title: Whats On Special and Unique Festivals
programme.desc: From Malta to Morocco, unique festivals capture Mediterranean creativity. Malta hosts the Valletta Green Festival, Notte Bianca, Malta Air Show, and Gharb International Kite and Wind Festival. Portugal celebrates with Festa das Cruzes, Morocco Dream City Festival dazzles with arts and music, Croatia brings the avant garde MoDem Festival, and Italy hosts the historic Venice Debutante Grand Ball. These festivals showcase the extraordinary, the festive, and the unforgettable.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Montenegro
programme.desc: Malini explores Montenegro’s stunning landscapes, from the Bay of Kotor and its historic old town to the beaches of Sveti Stefan and Budva. Venturing inland to Skadar Lake and local wineries, she discovers the natural beauty, rich flavours, and warm hospitality of this rising Adriatic destination.

programme.title: MED Destination ITHAKA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: MEMOIRS JUNE 17
programme.desc: MEMOIRS JUNE 17

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Prepare for a taste of vibrant flavors in this episode as Chryso Lefou whips up classic sweet and sour chicken, combining tender chicken with a tangy, fruity sauce. For dessert, she creates banana tempura, crispy on the outside and soft and sweet inside, offering a playful finish to the meal. An episode that balances bold savory dishes with indulgent, creative desserts.

programme.title: Med Nations 11 Tunisia
programme.desc: From the historic medina of Tunis to coastal towns full of local traditions, Tunisia reveals a rich tapestry of culture, flavours, and Mediterranean life shaped by diverse civilisations.

programme.title: MED Destination LJUBLJANA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Minds 10 Julius Caesar
programme.desc: Julius Caesar, the formidable leader of ancient Rome, became a lasting symbol of ambition, power, and transformation, shaping the destiny of the Mediterranean world through conquest, vision, and a legacy that endures beyond his dramatic fall.

programme.title: Whats On Sports Across the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean celebrates athleticism. Italy hosts The Torino Royal Marathon and Maratona Reale, while France Roc d Azur brings mountain biking excitement. Croatia CRO Race showcases professional cycling, and Cyprus hosts both the Limassol Marathon and Leptos Cyprus 4 Day Challenge. From road races to endurance challenges, sports unite communities along stunning Mediterranean landscapes.

programme.title: MEMOIRS JUNE 17
programme.desc: MEMOIRS JUNE 17

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Naples is Italy in the extreme. We’ll prowl backstreet fish markets and dodge speedy Vespas before indulging in pizza where it was invented. Afterward, we'll climb to the top of nearby Mount Vesuvius, then wander through the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman town it destroyed.

programme.title: Io Ti Cerchero
programme.desc: Valerio uncovers new witnesses who claim Ettore was thrown into the river, not a suicide. This deepens his suspicions of foul play. Meanwhile, a fabricated diary surfaces, accusing Valerio and undermining his investigation.

programme.title: Mentre ero via
programme.desc: Monica uncovers shocking truths about her late husband, including an illegitimate child, and faces a tense encounter at the lake villa. Meanwhile, Stefano learns of a potential scandal involving the Grossi company, and Monica recalls her role in the events that led to Marco and Gianluca's deaths.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Athena: Armed Wisdom reveals the story of the goddess who combines intellect with strength, emerging fully grown from the head of Zeus. As the goddess of wisdom and warfare, she guides heroes and protects cities with her strategic mind. Athena's power lies not in brute force, but in her ability to outthink and outmaneuver her foes. A myth that highlights the harmony between wisdom and strength.

programme.title: Concerto - Schubert e Strauss per Mariotti e OSN
programme.desc: The Rai National Symphony Orchestra, under the baton of conductor Michele Mariotti, presents a captivating performance featuring the works of Franz Schubert and Richard Strauss. The programme showcases Schubert's rich melodies and lyrical compositions alongside Strauss's dynamic and expressive pieces, offering a journey through the Romantic and late-Romantic musical landscapes. The orchestra's interpretation highlights the depth and emotional power of these renowned composers, creating a memorable concert experience.

programme.title: Jesenice
programme.desc: In the hillside village of Staro Selo Jesenice, with views of the central Dalmatian islands, we found stone houses, a bocce court, and a traditional tavern run by Ante Bajso. There, he treated us to a Dalmatian classic—meat slow-cooked under a bell-shaped lid, peka.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Lisbon
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Lisbon, the vibrant capital of Portugal. Once founded by the Phoenicians and shaped by Romans, Moors, and explorers of the Golden Age, Lisbon’s layered history is reflected in its culture and charm. During her visit, the city comes alive with the Festas Populares de Lisboa — a June celebration of Saint Anthony filled with music, dancing, and barbecued sardines. Malini samples local favorites like grilled sardines, bifanas, and the famous pastel de nata, and experiences the soulful beauty of Fado music. Lisbon’s warmth, flavor, and festive spirit show why it remains one of Europe’s most beloved cities.

programme.title: Whats On Trade, Exhibitions and Unique Experiences
programme.desc: There is a unique energy that takes over the Mediterranean as the summer heat begins to build. This week, we are bypassing the usual tourist routes to find the heartbeat of the region through its most spectacular festivals. Imagine the sun setting over a lake in Tuscany as the Puccini Festival opens its 72nd season with the powerful melodies of Turandot. From that timeless elegance, we head straight into the high energy of Malta, where the Isle of MTV and the 10th anniversary of the Glitch Festival are turning the islands into a global hub for electronic music. We also explore the stunning heights of the Spanish Pyrenees for the floating stage at Pirineos Sur and hit the iconic cliffs of Santorini for the urban vibes of the Supa Dupa Fly Festival. This is a journey through a region that knows exactly how to celebrate its past while dancing firmly into the future.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: The medieval treasury of Czech kings, Kutná Hora owes its prominence to its mines. In fact, the richness of the city’s silver mines was what saw it declared a royal city and made the seat of the Bohemian Royal Mint. As Rohan visits the city’s significant monuments such as a cathedral dedicated to the patron saint of all miners and the erstwhile central mint of the country, he finds out interesting stories about its mining and minting history.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Renowned journalist and traveler, Emeline Nsingi Nkosi visits the colourful, clean and minimalist seaside city of Helsinki, the capital of Finland. Here, she explores the iconic attractions, right from magnificent historical fortresses and monuments to churches and libraries with groundbreaking design. She finds out that Helsinki offers a fascinating journey through centuries of evolving architecture and style. She also pampers herself at a Finnish sauna.

She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex has varied experiences in Dubai like trying Lebanese cheese bread, visiting a coffee museum, going to IMG Worlds of Adventure and more.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: This exhilarating city of castles, beer and segway rides can take you on a break that will truly leave you catching your breath.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: portafoglio di squacquerone, ciliegie e mortadella, riso rosso integrale con pollo e peperoni, diplomatico alle rose. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: rotolo di riso, prosciutto e melone, risotto alla rucola con kiwi e vongole, e budino di riso. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Nella prima puntata Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici incontrano il primo gruppo di ballerini.Per essere selezionati per il prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK devono affrontare 3 sfide: presentare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Graham" con il maestro Antonio Fini.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Continuano le audizioni di Antonio Fini e dei suoi giudici per selezionare i migliori danzatori da invitare al prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK. I ragazzi affrontano le tre sfide previste: portare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di Hip hop con Mirco Giordano e Marcello Gargarelli.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita Frank Gullo al suo stabilimento "Gullo Seafood" per scoprire i segreti di un polpo perfetto, per poi andare con Mr.Octoman a preparare alcune ricette in due ristoranti a New York, "Perla" e "Quality Italian". (2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado, si trova a Milano e visita uno storico ristorante stellato, "Aimo e Nadia", dove incontra ed intervista Stefania Moroni figlia della signora Nadia ed il signor Aimo. Nella bellissima cucina Ornella incontra due bravissimi chef come Fabio Pisani e Alessandro Negrini. Insieme preparano alcuni piatti classici del menù del ristorante di Aimo e Nadia.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Nel 2015 Ornella Fado ha celebrato 10 anni di produzione televisiva e di messa in onda su NYC LIFE, il canale pubblico di New York. Questa puntata raccoglie alcuni dei momenti più belli del programma televisivo Brindiamo!

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Continua il viaggio dei 10 anni di Brindiamo! nella seconda parte Ornella viene presentata dal famoso conduttore televisio della WB 11, Howard Thompson grande fan di Brindiamo! Nella prima parte della puntata, Ornella visita il ristorante "Il Baluardo" nella regione Piemonte dove incontra lo chef Marc Lanteri. A Central Park, Ornella intervista la bellissima Barbara D'Urso e rivivono le emozioni del party " La dolce Vita" dove Barbara era l'ospite d'onore con Lee Curreri.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Siamo alla terza ed ultima parte del viaggio dei 10 anni di Brindiamo! Prima tappa Montreal. Ornella visita il mercato Jean -Talon con Aldo, per poi andare da "Vinizza" per preparare alcune pizze.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova a St. George's Island, nelle Bermuda per filmare due favolosi episodi di Brindiamo! In questa prima puntata Ornella é in cucina con chef Michele Belotti e prepara alcune ricette per l'evento "Italian Night in Bermuda" che si terrà al St. George's Club.L'evento presentato da Ursula Avella, presidente della "Great Culinary Minds" e` stato un grande successo. (2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado si trova in Piemonte per scorpire il territorio e visitare alcuni ristoranti stellati. In questa puntata Ornella visita la Reggia di Venaria, dove il Re del ristorante "Dolce Stil Novo", chef Alfredo Russo prepara nella spaziosa e super moderna cucina delle prelibatezze tipiche piemontesi. Ornella visita anche la scuola di restauro e parla con la responsabile della scuola Dr.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Washington DC e va a scoprire un ristorante proprio a due passi dalla Casa Bianca, il ristorante si chiama "Luigino", il proprietario e chef è Carmine Marzano. Chef Marzano prepara delle ricette tipiche piemontesi. Ospite della trasmissione la bellissima Adrianna Sgarlata Miss Virginia 2006. (2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita chef Cesare Casella nel suo ristorante nel Village "Maremma" per preparare alcune delle sue ricette preferite. Con Cesare Ornella visita upstate un allevamento di maiali e mucche Chianine. Cesare Casella oltre ad essere un bravissimo chef è anche uno stimatissimo insegnate, è infatti il Dean del programma di cucina italiana all' "International Culinary Center" a Soho ed Ornella è andata a trovarlo con le telecamere di Brindiamo!.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Il Circo" nel cuore di Manhattan, dove conosce la signora Egidiana autrice di diversi libri di cucina. Dopo aver preprato alcune specialità del ristorante, Ornella visita il Re della ristorazione francese al ristornate Le Cirque. Il Signore Mauro Maccioni in una intervsita racconta ad Ornella la sua favolosa carriera nella ristorazione.(2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: In questa puntata, Ornella Fado conduce un favoloso evento dedicato alla Regione Calabria da Eataly Downtown, preparando ricette insieme allo chef calabrese Luca Caligiuro e allo chef italo-americano Ryan Rizzuto.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Ornella Fado è a Milano, all'EXPO, con i giovani della Basilicata del progetto Sano è Lucano. I prodotti tipici lucani ispirano una serie di incontri culinari: dalla barca alla Mondadori, fino a Lady Bu Bistrò e al ristorante stellato Il Luogo di Aimo e Nadia con lo chef Fabio Pisani.Il racconto è arricchito dagli interventi di Sara Farnetti e Pietro Bitonti.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: In questa puntata, Ornella Fado conduce un favoloso evento dedicato alla Regione Calabria da Eataly Downtown, preparando ricette insieme allo chef calabrese Luca Caligiuro e allo chef italo-americano Ryan Rizzuto.

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Piero Muscari intervista Emanuela Rossi, famosa attrice e doppiatrice italiana che ha dato voce a molte grandi attrici di Hollywood, da Michelle Pfeiffer a Cate Blanchett.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: La puntata di oggi è ricca di contenuti. Ornella Fado incontra Cristina Carrani, esperta in materia immobiliare che aiuterà Ornella a scoprire l'Isola di Capri. Dalla moda alla storia, al cibo e all'arte, Brindiamo! Edizione speciale Capri è l'episodio perfetto per festeggiare i 18 anni di Brindiamo! su NYC LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York ed invita i suoi amici chef per preparare insieme delle ricette da gustare durante le festività natalizie. In questa puntata Chef Pino Coladonato, Chef Marcello Russodivito e la giovane pizzaiola Giorgia Caporuscio. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen ospite speciale la soprano Cristina Fontanelli e John La Barbera, oltre a vari ospiti del mondo dello spettacolo, e della moda. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York per la serconda parte di Brindiamo! in my kitchen. I suoi amici chef in questa puntata son lo chef Raffaele Ronca, lo Chef Marco Chirico e il giovane pizzaiolo Ettore Toches. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen la musica è dal vivo con la soprano Cristina Fontanelli ed il compositore Jhon La Barbera, tra gli ospiti di questa puntata il Fashion designer Domenico Vacca. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado continua il suo giro per incontrare il suoi amici ristoratori durante le festività di capodanno. Visitando a midtown Chef Pino alla "La Masseria", chef Stefano e Franco a " Viceversa", a "PizzArte" incontra il pizzaiolo Roberto ed il proprietario Dario, a Queens visita "Ornella Trattoria" dove incontra Vincenzo e "Trattoria l'Incontro"dove incontra lo chef e proprietario Rocco. (2013/2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Masseria dei Vini" a New York City per fare un viaggio culinario tramite il buon vino di Puglia insieme a quattro chef della Regione. La prima ricetta la prepara lo chef e proprietario Pino Coladonato, la seconda lo chef Alessandro Pendinelli, la terza ricetta lo chef Massimo Convertini. Per concludere in dolcezza e bellezza il dessert viene preparato dallo chef Mauro Abignente. (2018)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: New York City. Ornella Fado conduce un favoloso evento per la Regione Calabria da "Eataly Downtown", preparando delle ricette con lo chef calabrese Luca Caligiuro, e lo chef italo americano Ryan Rizzuto. Ospite della puntata la chef più amata d'America Lidia Bastianich. (2018)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova a Filadelfia e visita uno dei ristoranti Italiani piu` belli della città, "Gran Caffè l'Aquila". Oltre a preparare una ricetta classica romana con Riccardo Longo, proprietario del ristorante, Ornella prepara una ricetta classica abruzzese con Stefano Biasini. Stefano, "maestro" gelatiere pluripremiato, ci delizia con ottimi gelati. Al bar, Luciano, il bartender confeziona un favoloso ed elegante aperitivo tutto italiano. (2018)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita Frank Gullo al suo stabilimento "Gullo Seafood" per scoprire i segreti di un polpo perfetto, per poi andare con Mr.Octoman a preparare alcune ricette in due ristoranti a New York, "Perla" e "Quality Italian". (2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado, si trova a Milano e visita uno storico ristorante stellato, "Aimo e Nadia", dove incontra ed intervista Stefania Moroni figlia della signora Nadia ed il signor Aimo. Nella bellissima cucina Ornella incontra due bravissimi chef come Fabio Pisani e Alessandro Negrini. Insieme preparano alcuni piatti classici del menù del ristorante di Aimo e Nadia.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Nel 2015 Ornella Fado ha celebrato 10 anni di produzione televisiva e di messa in onda su NYC LIFE, il canale pubblico di New York. Questa puntata raccoglie alcuni dei momenti più belli del programma televisivo Brindiamo!

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Continua il viaggio dei 10 anni di Brindiamo! nella seconda parte Ornella viene presentata dal famoso conduttore televisio della WB 11, Howard Thompson grande fan di Brindiamo! Nella prima parte della puntata, Ornella visita il ristorante "Il Baluardo" nella regione Piemonte dove incontra lo chef Marc Lanteri. A Central Park, Ornella intervista la bellissima Barbara D'Urso e rivivono le emozioni del party " La dolce Vita" dove Barbara era l'ospite d'onore con Lee Curreri.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova a St. George's Island, nelle Bermuda per filmare due favolosi episodi di Brindiamo! In questa prima puntata Ornella é in cucina con chef Michele Belotti e prepara alcune ricette per l'evento "Italian Night in Bermuda" che si terrà al St. George's Club.L'evento presentato da Ursula Avella, presidente della "Great Culinary Minds" e` stato un grande successo. (2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Nella prima puntata Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici incontrano il primo gruppo di ballerini.Per essere selezionati per il prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK devono affrontare 3 sfide: presentare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Graham" con il maestro Antonio Fini.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Continuano le audizioni di Antonio Fini e dei suoi giudici per selezionare i migliori danzatori da invitare al prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK. I ragazzi affrontano le tre sfide previste: portare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di Hip hop con Mirco Giordano e Marcello Gargarelli.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: portafoglio di squacquerone, ciliegie e mortadella, riso rosso integrale con pollo e peperoni, diplomatico alle rose. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: rotolo di riso, prosciutto e melone, risotto alla rucola con kiwi e vongole, e budino di riso. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado presenta il lavoro artistico della sua amica Geniale,Paola Sinisgalli fondatrice della "Creative Shakes" il lavoro artistico di oggi e` un corto che vede Paola nei panni di regista.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introduce il suo amico Geniale Sergio Furnari, e presenta un docuemntario su un suo ultimo lavoro aritistico "Covid Hero Monument"

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Piero Muscari intervista Franco Ricci, Presidente Fondazione Italiana Sommelier. Franco racconta l'importanza della cultura del vino in Italia e come la sua fondazione ha rivoluzionato questo settore in oltre 20 anni.

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Piero Muscari intervista Emanuela Rossi, famosa attrice e doppiatrice italiana che ha dato voce a molte grandi attrici di Hollywood, da Michelle Pfeiffer a Cate Blanchett.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado si trova in Piemonte per scorpire il territorio e visitare alcuni ristoranti stellati. In questa puntata Ornella visita la Reggia di Venaria, dove il Re del ristorante "Dolce Stil Novo", chef Alfredo Russo prepara nella spaziosa e super moderna cucina delle prelibatezze tipiche piemontesi. Ornella visita anche la scuola di restauro e parla con la responsabile della scuola Dr.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Washington DC e va a scoprire un ristorante proprio a due passi dalla Casa Bianca, il ristorante si chiama "Luigino", il proprietario e chef è Carmine Marzano. Chef Marzano prepara delle ricette tipiche piemontesi. Ospite della trasmissione la bellissima Adrianna Sgarlata Miss Virginia 2006. (2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita chef Cesare Casella nel suo ristorante nel Village "Maremma" per preparare alcune delle sue ricette preferite. Con Cesare Ornella visita upstate un allevamento di maiali e mucche Chianine. Cesare Casella oltre ad essere un bravissimo chef è anche uno stimatissimo insegnate, è infatti il Dean del programma di cucina italiana all' "International Culinary Center" a Soho ed Ornella è andata a trovarlo con le telecamere di Brindiamo!.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Il Circo" nel cuore di Manhattan, dove conosce la signora Egidiana autrice di diversi libri di cucina. Dopo aver preprato alcune specialità del ristorante, Ornella visita il Re della ristorazione francese al ristornate Le Cirque. Il Signore Mauro Maccioni in una intervsita racconta ad Ornella la sua favolosa carriera nella ristorazione.(2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York ed invita i suoi amici chef per preparare insieme delle ricette da gustare durante le festività natalizie. In questa puntata Chef Pino Coladonato, Chef Marcello Russodivito e la giovane pizzaiola Giorgia Caporuscio. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen ospite speciale la soprano Cristina Fontanelli e John La Barbera, oltre a vari ospiti del mondo dello spettacolo, e della moda. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York per la serconda parte di Brindiamo! in my kitchen. I suoi amici chef in questa puntata son lo chef Raffaele Ronca, lo Chef Marco Chirico e il giovane pizzaiolo Ettore Toches. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen la musica è dal vivo con la soprano Cristina Fontanelli ed il compositore Jhon La Barbera, tra gli ospiti di questa puntata il Fashion designer Domenico Vacca. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado continua il suo giro per incontrare il suoi amici ristoratori durante le festività di capodanno. Visitando a midtown Chef Pino alla "La Masseria", chef Stefano e Franco a " Viceversa", a "PizzArte" incontra il pizzaiolo Roberto ed il proprietario Dario, a Queens visita "Ornella Trattoria" dove incontra Vincenzo e "Trattoria l'Incontro"dove incontra lo chef e proprietario Rocco. (2013/2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: La puntata di oggi è ricca di contenuti. Ornella Fado incontra Cristina Carrani, esperta in materia immobiliare che aiuterà Ornella a scoprire l'Isola di Capri. Dalla moda alla storia, al cibo e all'arte, Brindiamo! Edizione speciale Capri è l'episodio perfetto per festeggiare i 18 anni di Brindiamo! su NYC LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Siamo alla terza ed ultima parte del viaggio dei 10 anni di Brindiamo! Prima tappa Montreal. Ornella visita il mercato Jean -Talon con Aldo, per poi andare da "Vinizza" per preparare alcune pizze.

A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado incontra un vero gentiluomo della ristorazione italiana a Filadelfia, Giuseppe Giuliani, patron de "La Buca". Giuseppe oltre a preparare alcune ricette toscane, racconta l'avventura dell'apertura atipica e fuori programma del ristorante per ospitare il Maestro Luciano Pavarotti in tour a Filadelfia.(2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita una delle pizzerie piu` autentiche di New York,con uno dei 5 forni a legna più antichi della città`. "Luzzo" Pizzeria si trova a due passi dal quartiere trendy, il Village. Con Michele Iuliano, pizzaiolo napoletano di grande esperienza, Ornella prepara delle deliziose pizze, alcune tradizionali come la classica margherita ed alcune con un twist. Ospite della puntata il giovane talento Italiano il tenore Luciamo La Monarca.(2008)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita uno dei ristoranti più belli d'Europa, "Don Alfonso 1890" dove incontra la famiglia Iaccarino. Oltre a preparare le ricette nella bellissima cucina con chef Ernesto Iaccarino, Ornella intervista Livia Iaccarino, la prima sommelier donna in Italia, la signora Iaccarino racconta la bellissima storia della famiglia di Don Alfonso, che ha fatto dell' ospitalità la sua stroria.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita due ristoranti di eccellenza, San Pietro e Masseria. Al San Pietro Ornella incontra i fratelli Bruno, con lo chef Antonio prepara delle ricette gustose del classico menù del ristorante, mentre Gerardo racconta la storia del rstorante ed il successo dei loro ristoranti. Da Masseria Ornella incontra lo Chef e Patron Pino Coladonato, e preparano delle ricette tipiche pugliesi.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita" Via Oreto", un ristorante dal cuore siciliano. Antony prepara le ricette della nonna e della mamma. Accanto la nonna a visionare tutto. In questo episodio Ornella intervsita un esperto del vino siciliano Pietro Cavallo, e parlano dell'importanza di abbinare il giusto vino ad ogni piatto.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: La puntata di oggi è ricca di contenuti. Ornella Fado incontra Cristina Carrani, esperta in materia immobiliare che aiuterà Ornella a scoprire l'Isola di Capri. Dalla moda alla storia, al cibo e all'arte, Brindiamo! Edizione speciale Capri è l'episodio perfetto per festeggiare i 18 anni di Brindiamo! su NYC LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado incontra chef Rocco Sacramone al ristorante Trattoria "l'Incontro", Chef Rocco, condivide alcune delle ricette più amate dai suoi clienti incluso una dolcissima pizza alla nutella. (2008)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado incontra un vero gentiluomo della ristorazione italiana a Filadelfia, Giuseppe Giuliani, patron de "La Buca". programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante toscano "Pepolino" dove prepara delle saporite ricette con lo chef Patrizio, per chiudere in "Dolcezza e Bellezza" Enzo prepara una delle cheese cake piu` famose di New York.(2007).

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita uno dei ristoranti più eleganti di Manhattan a due passi da Central Park il "San Domenico ristorante". Nella cucina del ristorante Ornella assiste Odette Fada nella preparazione dei classici piatti Italiani. Ospite della puntata la giovane stilista Nicole Romano. Ornella Fado indossa alcune creazioni della sua collezione. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita una delle più belle scuole di cucine upstate in New York la "CIA" Culinary Institute of America, dove visita il ristorante "Caterina dei Medici", e con lo chef Scapin preprano alcune ricette del menù della scuola. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Raffaele Trovato, direttore dell'IFSE, a Piobesi Torinese, oltre a visitare la bellissima scuola, Ornella prepara delle ricette con l'istruttore del centro.(2009)
